backup_media.name: Backup media path
backup_media.description: Destination path under /share for storing the Kopia repository

snapshot_paths.name: Snapshot paths
snapshot_paths.description: List of paths to include in snapshots

sync_enabled.name: Enable scheduled sync
sync_enabled.description: Run repository syncs automatically using the cron expression below

sync_schedule.name: Sync schedule
sync_schedule.description: Cron expression with 5 fields, for example 0 3 * * *

sync_to_repositories.name: Sync destinations
sync_to_repositories.description: Optional secondary repositories that receive a Kopia sync from the primary Home Assistant repository on startup and on the configured schedule

type.name: Backend type
type.description: Storage backend used by this destination

path.name: Path
path.description: Filesystem or SFTP path for the destination repository

url.name: URL
url.description: WebDAV URL for the destination repository

bucket.name: Bucket
bucket.description: Bucket name for S3, GCS or B2

prefix.name: Prefix
prefix.description: Optional subdirectory or object prefix inside the destination backend

endpoint.name: Endpoint
endpoint.description: Custom S3 endpoint for non-AWS providers such as Backblaze or MinIO

region.name: Region
region.description: S3 region when required by the provider

username.name: Username
username.description: Login name for WebDAV or SFTP

password.name: Password
password.description: Credential used by WebDAV or SFTP

sas_token.name: SAS token
sas_token.description: Azure SAS token as an alternative to the account key

credentials_json.name: Credentials JSON
credentials_json.description: Google Cloud service account JSON for GCS

delete.name: Delete extra blobs
delete.description: Delete destination blobs that no longer exist in the primary repository

must_exist.name: Destination must exist
must_exist.description: Fail this destination if the remote repository has not been created yet

parallel.name: Parallelism
parallel.description: Number of parallel copy workers used by Kopia

update.name: Update newer objects
update.description: Allow Kopia to update destination blobs when the source is newer

enabled.name: Enabled
enabled.description: Whether this destination should be processed on startup

server_username.name: Server username
server_username.description: Username used to log in to the Kopia web server

password.name: Repository password
password.description: Password used to create/connect the Kopia repository
